Tooleva

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: March 12, 2026

1. File Processing

Our core promise is that we do not upload your files. When you use our PDF manipulation or image optimization tools, all processing occurs within your device's web browser. We cannot see, access, store, or distribute your files.

2. Information We Collect

We use standard analytics tools (Google Analytics) to understand aggregated traffic patterns. This includes identifying pages visited and coarse geographic data to help us improve the website.

3. Advertising

We use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google uses cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to our website or other websites.

© 2026 Tooleva.
